docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY LUPIN-JIMENEZ, LEONARD AS TO DEFENDANT REEDER, GABRIELLA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-23-2025 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE WAS $0.00 SERVED JUL-03-2025, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT REEDER, GABRIELLA

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-23-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-23-2025 BY VISITING JUDGE TAMILA IPEMA. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF LEONARD LUPIN-JIMENEZ IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT GABRIELLA REEDER IS PRESENT. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-23-2025 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LUPIN-JIMENEZ, LEONARD IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT REEDER, GABRIELLA PLAINTIFF HAS FAILED TO MEET HIS BURDEN OF PROOF. JUDGMENT IN FAVOR OF THE DEFENDANT. DOGS ARE CONSIDERED TO BE CHATTLES OR PROPERTY UNDER THE LAW. THE OWNERSHIP IS THEREFORE DETERMINED BY THE TITLE. DEFENDANT'S NAME APPEARS ON THE TITLE ALONE & THEREFORE THE LEGAL OWMER OF THE PET DOG "LUNA" IS THE DEFENDANT. ALL THE MONIES PLAINTIFF SPENT ON LUNA IS CONSIDERED TO BE GIFT TO HIS BELOVED PET DOG LUNA IS NOT REIMBURSABLE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

REMARK:RETURNED MAIL FROM THE POST OFFICE. 08/04/2025. SC-100 PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM AND ORDER TO GO TO SMALL CLAIMS COURT MAILED TO DEFENDANT. (RETURN TO SENDER NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED UNABLE TO FORWARD)
